div1.entryFree:
Challenger, 1) claimant: he bids you then resign your crown and kingdom indirectly held from him the native and true c. H5 II, 4, 95. whose worth stood c. on mount of all the age for her perfections, Hml. IV, 7, 28. cf. also R2 V, 3, 19.
2) one who defies or calls to a single combat: As I, 2, 170. As I, 2, 170 As I, 2, 170 IV, 3, 32.
